overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character in traditional yellow robes and a wide-brimmed hat walking along a cliff edge. The character approaches a waterfall overlook and stops to survey a scenic valley with distant mountains, a fortress, and purple flower fields under an overcast sky.

events.description: character slows and stops at the cliff edge overlooking the waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow cliff path toward the waterfall edge, weapons visible on back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail along the cliff edge with patches of grass
cascading waterfall flowing down the rocky cliff face into the pool below
steep gray rock formation with the waterfall cutting through it
deep blue water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a narrow dirt trail at the edge of a high cliff. The path leads toward a dramatic waterfall cascading down the gray rocky cliff face into a deep blue pool below. Sparse vegetation dots the landscape, and the sky is overcast with diffused natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: character stops walking and stands motionless at the cliff edge
camera pans left to reveal distant mountain fortress and expansive river valley

agents.ego_description: standing still at the cliff edge, gazing out over the river valley and distant mountains with hands resting near weapons

entered.detail: large fortress structure with red accents perched atop a distant mountain peak
fields of purple flowers covering the valley slopes
winding river cutting through the valley floor below

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the cliff edge overlooking the waterfall. The camera slowly pans left around the character, revealing a sweeping view of the river valley below. A distant mountain fortress with red banners becomes visible, along with fields of purple flowers covering the valley slopes. The waterfall remains visible on the right side as the panoramic vista unfolds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused trek along a cliffside and expands into a sweeping panoramic vista of a river valley. It begins with the samurai walking along a narrow dirt trail at the edge of a high cliff, moving toward a dramatic waterfall that cascades down gray rock into a deep blue pool under an overcast sky. As the character reaches the precipice and comes to a halt, the camera slowly pans left to shift the focus from the immediate waterfall to the vast landscape beyond. The scene then opens up to reveal a sweeping view of the valley below, where fields of purple flowers cover the slopes and a distant mountain fortress with red banners emerges on the horizon.
